body: {"rationale":"Strong bead overall. Title is imperative and names subsystem + change. Description has PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE with file:line reference, PROPOSED FIX, and NON-SCOPE. AC has numbered items with specific test function names (TestPrompts_ClaudeVariant_ByteIdentical, TestPrompts_AgentVariant_ByteIdentical), go test gate, and lefthook gate. Labels include phase, story, area, kind. Parent and dep are explicit. Minor gaps: (1) the file:line reference is approximate ('cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go (or prompts package)' — 'or' suggests the author hasn't confirmed the exact file); (2) AC item 5 uses './internal/agent/...' but the actual package location should be verified against the codebase; (3) no explicit 'no deps beyond ddx-cfedee8e' statement — the dep is listed but the description only mentions it as context, not as a hard prerequisite in the AC or deps field; (4) the golden snapshot test approach is sound but AC does not specify where the snapshots live or how to regenerate them, which could block a sub-agent.","score":7,"suggested_fixes":["Confirm the exact file path for the two string constants (grep for executeBeadInstructionsClaudeText) and replace 'cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go (or prompts package)' with the confirmed path and line number.","Add an AC line specifying snapshot file location and regeneration command (e.g., 'Snapshots stored under cli/internal/agent/testdata/; regenerate with go test -update').","Tighten dep note: add a line in description 'Deps: ddx-cfedee8e must be merged before this bead is dispatched to avoid merge conflict.'","Verify the go test path './internal/agent/...' matches the actual package layout (run 'cd cli \u0026\u0026 go list ./internal/agent/...' to confirm)."],"waivers_applied":[]}
